title: tephroseris helenitis
intro: Tephroseris helenitis, also known as Helen's rock rose or moonlight rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting respiratory health. Tephroseris helenitis can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various forms.
